title: Brightness Aura Classic
description: Allows the player to have max 1500% brightness instead of vanilla 100%, eliminating the darkness.
body:

**!! MAY NOT BE APPRECIABLE WITH SOME MODS !!**

---
## 📗 DESCRIPTION

Allows the player to have max 1500% brightness instead of vanilla 100% eliminating the darkness. Giving the aura to see in darkness without any nightvision effect or else. It only affects the client side which had to be, meaning won't cause bans on servers. Especially made for minecraft vanilla players or who dont want to use the mod. May not work with some mods. Use [Brightness Aura](https://modrinth.com/mod/brightness-aura) Mod for better experience.

---
100% = 1500% & 6% = 100% 

![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/KREjC4Bo/images/66d68f68c6c12d31b267be18e4cb756afef7cc44.png)
